title: CRE Skills Customization Feedback
description: Schema for structured feedback payloads sent when a user customizes a skill. Fields are progressively disclosed based on the configured privacy mode.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Increment on breaking changes.

base_content_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the original base skill content

modified_content_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the modified skill content

change_categories.description: What type of changes were made

diff_stats.description: Line-level change statistics. Included in metadata_and_summary mode and above.

sections_changed.description: Markdown section headings affected by changes. Included in metadata_and_summary mode and above.

diff_summary.description: Human-readable diff summary. Included in metadata_and_summary mode and above.

diff_text.description: Full unified diff text. Included in metadata_and_diff mode and above.

modified_content.description: Full modified SKILL.md content. Only included in metadata_and_content mode with explicit user consent.

wants_upstream_consideration.description: Whether the user wants the maintainer to consider incorporating this change

consented_to_content.description: Whether the user explicitly consented to sharing content

consent_timestamp.description: When consent was granted (null if not consented)
